title: Planning Handoff Role Metadata
goal: Add compact, generic role metadata to planning-state v1 so lanes and ready slices can express decision, delivery, review, and knowledge-transfer responsibilities.
non_goals: Do not build a scheduler or assignment system.
Do not migrate state to work_items in this slice.
Do not encode agent vendor, tool, or personal preference assumptions.

intent.outcome: Planning state accepts and summarizes generic handoff roles without forcing simple work to fill every role field.
intent.constraints: Keep fields repo-, agent-, tool-, and language-agnostic; keep role metadata advisory.
intent.latitude: Choose compact output fields and validation rules that make the next needed role visible.
intent.escalation: Stop before adding scheduling, assignment, or broad summary migration.

execution.milestone: Define and expose planning-state handoff role metadata.
execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #498, then continue with #499 when selected.
execution.proof: planning package tests, ruff, planning doctor, summary

invariants: Role metadata is optional for simple work.
Roles remain generic strings, not runtime-specific targets.
Summary can identify the next role needed without becoming a dashboard.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Planning state supports progressive refinement and multi-agent handoff through explicit maturity, roles, promotion, and closeout state.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Role-aware planning records and compact routing for the next needed role.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Maturity-aware summary redesign, state migration, and transition helpers.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: A malformed owner_role must not satisfy ready-slice ownership; the validator now requires typed role metadata before using it.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Focused and full planning package tests, ruff, planning doctor, planning-surface checker, and compact summary passed.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: None for #498; continue #499 for maturity-aware summary behavior.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Make team-style handoff responsibilities visible without adding ceremony.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add generic role fields to v1 validation/summary projections.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Reject changes that make roles mandatory for all work or act like scheduling.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning package state validation/summary code and tests; active planning files
execution_bounds.required validation commands: cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any migration of state shape or broad handoff/orchestrator redesign.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: agent aid lifecycle, generated CLI, full state migration

stop_conditions.stop when: #498 acceptance is met with role metadata and focused tests.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: The next change would assign work to specific runtimes or require scheduling.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Summary or current v1 state reports warnings.

context_budget.live working set: #498 issue body, planning-state v1 validation, summary roadmap projection
context_budget.recoverable later: parent #496 details and later child issues
context_budget.pre-work config pull: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "implement #498 planning handoff role metadata" --format json
context_budget.context-shift triggers: subagent map shows broader impact than summary/validation.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Add compact handoff role metadata for planning-state work.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No scheduler; no vendor/runtime assumptions; optional for simple work.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact compact projection fields and validation warning names.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Roles need to become assignments or personal preferences.

active_milestone.scope: planning-state role metadata validation and summary

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan and continue #499 from the planning-state-maturity lane.
invariants: No host or agent runtime assumptions enter shared state.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Supported role fields: decision_owner, strategy_role, delivery_role, review_role, knowledge_owner, owner_role, handoff_ready.
Ready slices can declare handoff_ready explicitly.
open_questions_to_close: What compact summary answer should identify the next role needed?
validation_commands: cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Mature lanes/slices can carry decision, delivery, review, and knowledge-transfer roles.
Summary exposes a compact next-role-needed answer.
Tests cover role projection and keep simple work lightweight.

execution_run.what happened: Added optional planning-state role metadata validation, ready-slice handoff_ready enforcement, and role projections in active planning/handoff summaries.
execution_run.scope touched: planning state validation/projection code, focused planning tests, and active planning state.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "planning_state_v1 or handoff_role_metadata"; cd packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #498 is complete; #499 remains the next planning-state-maturity child issue.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; no scheduling, assignment, or runtime-specific fields were added.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; state can carry generic roles and summary/handoff expose them compactly.
finished_run_review.config compliance: used summary/reconcile/skills and checked-in active planning before implementation
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: medium; avoid turning metadata into scheduling

proof_report.validation proof: planning package tests, ruff, planning doctor, planning-surface checker, and compact summary passed.
proof_report.proof achieved now: Role metadata validation/projection works and active state remains clean.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: 145 planning tests passed; ruff passed; doctor healthy; planning-surface checker clean; summary warning_count 0.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Add handoff role metadata for multi-agent team-style work.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: planning-state v1 validates generic role fields and handoff_ready, and summary/handoff expose role_metadata plus next_role_needed.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make restart, handoff, and delegation cheaper by preserving intent and responsibilities in queryable state.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Add optional metadata and compact projection, not a scheduler.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can summary say which role should act next without requiring raw state interpretation?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #498 is satisfied while parent #496 remains open for #499-#501.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: role metadata fields and ready handoff gate are in code and tests.
closure_check.reopen trigger: ready slices cannot expose handoff readiness or next needed role

durable_residue.learned constraint: Role metadata should route handoff, not schedule execution.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Specialized agents need decision/delivery/review/knowledge boundaries visible in compact state.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Planning-state v1 supports generic advisory handoff role metadata and compact next-role routing.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: 145 planning tests, ruff, doctor, planning-surface checker, and summary passed.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Keep the role metadata contract in code/tests and continue maturity summary behavior in #499.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory or docs promotion needed; the durable contract lives in validation and tests.

discard.summary: No local execution detail needs durable promotion beyond proof fields.

continuation.summary: Planning-state maturity continues through #499-#501 after role metadata.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted #498 from planning-state-maturity roadmap lane into an active execplan.
